recommendations.title: The Last Summer
recommendations.overview: Standing on the precipice of adulthood, a group of friends navigate new relationships, while reexamining others, during their final summer before college.

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: And Then We Danced
recommendations.overview: Merab, a devoted dancer, has been training for years with his partner Mary for a spot in the National Georgian Ensemble. The arrival of another male dancer, Irakli, sparks both an intense rivalry and romantic desire that may cause Merab to risk his f

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.

recommendations.title: Men in Hope
recommendations.overview: Charming bon vivant Rudolf is convinced that infidelity is the basis for a happy marriage, since, after all, a woman does not want to be bored with her partner.

recommendations.title: The Merry Gentlemen
recommendations.overview: To save her parents' small-town nightclub, a Broadway dancer stages an all-male, Christmas-themed revue — and meets a guy with all the right moves.

recommendations.title: Tango
recommendations.overview: A static camera observes a room as it slowly fills with thirty-six characters from different stages of life, looping further through an absurd dance of social disconnection as each character moves in.

recommendations.title: Fala Sério, Mãe!
recommendations.overview: Ângela Cristina, mother of teenager Maria de Lourdes, has to deal with the difficulties and delights of guiding her daughter during one of the most complicated stages of life.

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.
